description: New LinkedIn posts to create in Notion — generated 2026-04-06. Push via: python scripts/notion_sync.py push data/schedules/new-posts-2026-04.json

posts.name: TV_BroadwayPharmacy_MichaelBall_Spotlight
posts.idea: Customer spotlight: Michael Ball, Director at Cure Clinics, posted publicly about hands-on time with Titanverse at Broadway Pharmacy — unsolicited, named, director-level validation. Get permission from Michael via DM before posting. Single image: dark Titanverse background with his quote in large white bold text: 'A platform built with operators in mind, not just designed in isolation.' His name and title below, Broadway Pharmacy / Cure Clinics credit at bottom, Titanverse logo bottom right.
posts.caption:
An honest review from a Director who just spent the afternoon with us.

That is from Michael Ball, Director at Cure Clinics, after hands-on time with Titanverse at Broadway Pharmacy.

He did not reach out to us.
He posted it publicly.

What stood out was not the feature list.

It was the thinking behind it.

A platform built for how pharmacy actually works.
Not designed in isolation.

That is the only kind of feedback that matters.

#Titanverse #PharmacyServices #CommunityPharmacy

posts.name: TV_PharmAppy_PrioryBroadway_Integration_Update
posts.idea: Pharmacy websites should not be separate from pharmacy services. The PharmAppy + Titanverse integration story — Priory Pharmacy live, Broadway next. Single image: two logos connected by a line. Clean, minimal. Dark background.
posts.caption:
Pharmacy websites should not be separate from pharmacy services.

When a patient books through PharmAppy, that consultation needs to live somewhere.

Not in a separate system.
Not manually transferred.

With Titanverse, it does.

The booking.
The consultation.
The record.

Connected. From first click to final note.

Priory Pharmacy is already live with this.
Broadway is next.

#Titanverse #PharmAppy #PharmacyServices #PharmacyIntegration

posts.name: TITAN_Kanav_CaseStudy_SingleImage
posts.idea: Case study post from Kanav interview (May 2025 cohort). Read _interviews-processed/Kanav.md first. Extract the tipping point moment and key before/after numbers. Single image: photo of Kanav at the pharmacy or branded dark background with key stat. Hook: specific outcome or transformation moment.

posts.name: TITAN_Abel_Amanda_CohortPost
posts.idea: Case study from the June 2025 interview cohort (Abel, Amanda, Andy, Anoop, Charlie, Ivan, Kate, Sharne). Read _interviews-processed/ files for each. Pick the strongest tipping point moment and before/after from this cohort. Do NOT use Prab/Sagar/Yusuf/Rahul material (already well-covered). Fresh face from the cohort.

posts.name: TV_FragmentationHook_v2
posts.idea: Updated fragmentation hook. The original Oct/Nov 2025 fragmentation posts drove the highest Titanverse engagement. This is v2: 'Count how many apps you open before you finish one consultation.' Same pain angle, new copy. Short, punchy single image. Dark purple background, bold white text.
posts.caption:
Count how many apps you open before you finish one consultation.

EPS.
Consultation template.
Booking system.
Patient record.
Messaging tool.
Maybe a spreadsheet.

That is five systems for one 15-minute consultation.

Every handoff is a risk.
Every tab switch costs time.
Every manual note is a chance for something to go wrong.

Titanverse puts the whole flow in one place.

Consultation. Prescribing. Records. Services.

No more tabs.
No more double entry.
No more gaps.

One app. One flow.

#Titanverse #PharmacyWorkflow #PharmacyServices

posts.name: TV_Yusuf_FollowUp_Quote
posts.idea: Follow-up from the Yusuf Titanverse interview (Yusuf-Titanverse-Full-Interview.txt and Yusuf-2025Dec3.txt). Read _interviews-processed/Yusuf.md. Extract a quote that hasn't been used in a published Titanverse post yet. Single image quote format on dark background.

posts.name: TITAN_Asif_FullCarousel_CaseStudy
posts.idea: Full case study carousel on Asif from Safy's Chemist. The 'We spoke to Asif from Safy's Chemist' post (Jan 7) was never published — this is the carousel version. Read the Asif-Full-Interview.txt first. 7-slide arc: Hook (before state) → Before numbers → Decision/tipping point → What changed → Outcomes (15k items) → Direct quote → CTA. Real numbers, real quote, real pharmacy name.
posts.caption:
👀 We spoke to Asif from Safy's Chemist.

Here is what he told us.

Safy's Chemist dispenses around 15,000 items a month. 💊

Before Titan, the pressure was all going in the wrong direction.

Swipe to see what changed.

📖 Read Asif's full story → titanpmr.com/case-studies

posts.name: TITAN_158Million_ClawbackCarousel
posts.idea: The £158 million clawback carousel (originally scheduled Jan 29, never posted). Policy/finance angle — NHS reclaims underclaimed money from pharmacies. This is a high-stakes education carousel. Structure: What happened → Why it matters → What pharmacies at risk have in common → How to protect your income → Titan's role. Hook: the £158m number.
posts.caption:
£158 million.

That is what pharmacies left on the table last year.

Not through fraud.
Not through negligence.

Through under-claiming.

The difference between pharmacies that lost money and those that didn't is not luck.

Swipe to see what they did differently.

💬 Has your pharmacy been hit by a clawback? Drop your experience in the comments.

#PharmacyFirst #NHS #CommunityPharmacy #TitanPMR
